title: Stream Status
description: Adds 🔴Live to streaming players in TAB
body:
# Stream Status MOD

Adds a 🔴Live indicator next to players' names in the multiplayer TAB list.

---

## 📥 Installation

- This mod requires **Minecraft Forge 47.4.0** (for Minecraft 1.20.1).
- Drop `streamstatus-1.0.0.jar` into your `mods/` folder.
- All players should install the mod for best compatibility.

---

## 🧱 Dependencies

- None (standalone Forge mod)

---

## 🎮 Features

- Displays 🔴Live next to player names in the TAB player list
- Toggle your status with `/streamon` and `/streamoff`
- Status is visible to all players
- State persists after logout / login
- Minimal design — no HUD clutter, no GUI changes

---

## ⚠️ Notes

- This mod is designed for streamers in multiplayer environments.
- No Twitch integration (yet), status is toggled manually.
- Intended to be lightweight and server-compatible.
- Only tested on **Windows + Java 17** environments.

---

## 🛠 Usage

- Type `/streamon` in chat to mark yourself as live.
- Type `/streamoff` to remove the indicator.
- No GUI or mod settings — everything is command-based.

---
